Key Intelligence Notes — Q3 2026
KC_01 Ruble / CBR (0.45 WATCH)

CBR key rate held at 19.5% after emergency hikes to 21% in 2025. USDRUB stabilised 86–89 via mandatory FX surrender rules (80% export revenue). Capital controls fully active. Further cut-cycle conditional on inflation <7%.

KC_02 Sanctions (0.52 WATCH)

New sanctions round Feb 2026 targeted LNG export infrastructure. Secondary sanctions threat on Indian/Chinese banks processing Russian payments. G7 oil price cap enforcement tightening. SWIFT isolation: 7 of top-10 Russian banks excluded.

KC_03 Energy Weaponization (0.58 ELEVATED)

Russia oil exports pivoted — China 38%, India 19% of flows. European gas flows at <10% of pre-war levels. Power of Siberia 2 negotiations stalled. LNG exports to Asia constrained by Feb 2026 equipment restrictions. ELEVATED: further weaponization structurally possible.

KC_04 Ukraine War / NATO Art.5 (0.48 WATCH — SINGLE TRIGGER)

Kharkiv offensive Apr 2026 pushed DKRI to peak. Ceasefire talks Jun 2026 partially de-escalated. SINGLE TRIGGER: any confirmed NATO direct engagement or tactical nuclear use → ELEVATED minimum.

KC_05 China-Russia Axis (0.35 WATCH)

CNY now 30% of Russia trade settlements. CIPS usage by Russian entities +40% YoY. No-limits partnership rhetoric maintained. Military cooperation expanding (drone technology transfer signals).

US Market Impact Summary — RRKI 0.545 WATCH
Defense Sector (LMT / RTX / NOC / GD): ⚔ CONFLICT BULLISH — Ukraine war escalation sensitivity +0.70–+0.85. At RRKI 0.55 ELEVATED, historical backtest shows +7–9% uplift. Current WATCH zone: +3–5% directional bias.
Energy (XOM / CVX / LNG): ⚡ ENERGY SUPPLY BULLISH on weaponization — energy_weaponization score 0.58 ELEVATED pushes XOM +3–4%, LNG +8%. European energy dislocation supports US LNG exports.
Banks (C / JPM): 🚨 SANCTIONS BEARISH — sanctions_escalation 0.52. Direct Russia exposure pre-sanction $2.1B (C) / $1.4B (JPM). Secondary sanctions risk via correspondent banking. MODERATE BEARISH.
Airlines (UAL): BEARISH — jet fuel cost uplift + Pacific route disruption risk from Russian airspace complications.
